description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that runs on push to the master branch in the ant-design-blazor repository. The workflow checks out the code, sets up .NET Core 3.1 and 5.0, Node.js 10.x, runs tests and generates a coverage report, packages a nightly NuGet package, publishes it to NuGet, updates documentation, deploys to GitHub Pages and GitHub.io, and syncs to Gitee.
